title: Looking for Category Manager at EaseMyTrip

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at EaseMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a Category Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
